At Moody's, we unite the brightest minds to turn today’s risks into tomorrow’s opportunities. We do this by striving to create an inclusive environment where everyone feels welcome to be who they are—with the freedom to exchange ideas, think innovatively, and listen to each other and customers in meaningful ways. Moody’s is transforming how the world sees risk. As a global leader in ratings and integrated risk assessment, we’re advancing AI to move from insight to action—enabling intelligence that not only understands complexity but responds to it. We decode risk to unlock opportunity, helping our clients navigate uncertainty with clarity, speed, and confidence.
   

  

 If you are excited about this opportunity but do not meet every single requirement, please apply! You still may be a great fit for this role or other open roles. We are seeking candidates who model our values: invest in every relationship, lead with curiosity, champion diverse perspectives, turn inputs into actions, and uphold trust through integrity.
   

  

**Skills And Competencies**
* 8\\+ years of hands\\-on software engineering experience, delivering high\\-impact, multi\\-team initiatives with measurable business outcomes
* Strong programming expertise in one or more of Java, Scala, C\\#, C\\+\\+, and Python, with a deep understanding of data structures, algorithms, and complexity analysis
* Proven experience with data platforms at scale, including relational databases (Postgres, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle) and NoSQL data stores, with strong query processing knowledge
* Expertise in building production\\-grade RESTful APIs and microservices with a focus on scalability, robustness, security, and reliability
* Hands\\-on experience with cloud\\-native and on\\-prem systems, leveraging Docker, Kubernetes, and modern deployment practices for cost\\-effective execution
* Advanced systems knowledge, including multi\\-threading, memory management, software design principles, architecture best practices, and writing well\\-tested, high\\-quality code
* Strong problem\\-solving mindset and resilience, with deep knowledge of testing strategies, system health monitoring, and adaptability to organizational and technical change
* Deep expertise in artificial intelligence, with a track record of implementing advanced AI solutions to drive strategic transformation and operational efficiency. Strong experience using AI tools to lead innovation initiatives. Demonstrated leadership in managing AI\\-related risks, ensuring ethical governance, and fostering a culture of responsible AI adoption across the organization.


**Education**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related discipline, or equivalent professional experience


**Responsibilities**
* Provide senior technical leadership by defining and executing multi\\-year engineering strategies that deliver measurable business and customer impact.
* Define and execute multi\\-year, multi\\-team technical strategies that align with business priorities and customer outcomes
* Lead large\\-scale, high\\-stakes initiatives, effectively managing complexity, ambiguity, risk, and quality at scale
* Drive alignment across engineering, product, and business teams to prioritize work that maximizes organizational value
* Exercise strong technical judgment to influence roadmaps, architectural direction, and strategic decisions across teams
* Build and evolve robust, scalable software architectures designed to support growth, flexibility, and new use cases
* Mentor and coach engineers across teams, fostering a strong growth mindset, technical excellence, and high performance
* Partner closely with product leaders and stakeholders, balancing technical trade\\-offs, diverse viewpoints, and long\\-term versus short\\-term needs
* Act as a role model by leading technical discussions, reviews, documentation, and change initiatives while embodying collaboration and Moody’s core values


**About The Team**
 The engineering team develops cutting\\-edge software, sophisticated models, and advanced analytics that power risk quantification for the global multi\\-trillion\\-dollar property and casualty insurance market. The team’s work enables organizations worldwide to better understand and manage the risks of natural and human\\-made catastrophes, including hurricanes, earthquakes, floods, wildfires, terrorism, cyber threats, climate change, and pandemics.
   

  

 Moody’s is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender expression, gender identity or any other characteristic protected by law.
   

  

 Candidates for Moody's Corporation may be asked to disclose securities holdings pursuant to Moody’s Policy for Securities Trading and the requirements of the position. Employment is contingent upon compliance with the Policy, including remediation of positions in those holdings as necessary.

title: Engineering Manager - REC Energy Chennai
description:
**Company Description**
**About Ramboll:**
 Ramboll is a global engineering, architecture, and consultancy company with a strong commitment to sustainability and innovation. We partner with clients to create solutions that enable future generations to thrive.
   

  

**Ramboll in India**
 Ramboll India is part of Ramboll Group owned by the Ramboll Foundation, with strong corporate values and long\\-term thinking. In India we have major offices in Gurugram, Noida, Hyderabad, Chennai and Mumbai. Here, you can apply your professional passion for high quality and delivering innovative solutions within Buildings, Transport, Water, Environment \\& Health, Energy and Management Consulting. We invite you to contribute to a sustainable future, working in an open, collaborative, and empowering culture.
   

  

**Position Summary:**
 We are seeking an experienced Engineering Manager with extensive expertise in the process, chemical, and petrochemical industries. The ideal candidate will have a strong track record in the early phases of engineering, working in a global multi\\-discipline environment, and managing projects across Europe, the USA, and other regions. This role involves liaising with clients to understand their needs and delivering innovative solutions. Additionally, the Engineering Manager will be a skilled problem solver, providing effective solutions for various scenarios. The position is based at our Global Engineering Center in Chennai.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Key Responsibilities:**
* Lead and manage engineering teams to deliver engineering and design packages for process, chemical, and petrochemical industries – Green field, Sustainable solutions, debottlenecking, facility augmentation, troubleshooting, etc.,
* Oversee various phases of engineering, primarily the early phases, including conceptual design, feasibility studies, and scope development.
* Work in a global, multi\\-discipline environment, coordinating with teams and stakeholders across different regions. Lead and guide the team to achieve project objectives.
* Manage projects for clients in Europe, the USA, and other countries.
* Liaise with clients to understand their requirements and ensure project goals align with their needs for innovative solutions.
* Liaise with external stakeholders like process licensors, OEMs, clients, and certification agencies.
* Provide troubleshooting and problem\\-solving expertise to address complex engineering challenges.
* Ensure adherence to industry standards, regulations, and best practices in process and chemical engineering.
* Mentor and develop junior engineers, fostering a culture of continuous learning and deliver solutions that are cost effective, realistic, safe for the business, environment, and society.
* Collaborate with other departments, including procurement, construction, and operations, to ensure seamless project delivery.
* Prepare and present engineering reports, project updates, and technical documentation to senior management and clients.
* Technical requirement and scope management
* Scope alignment, link the agreed scope with budget. Raise additional work if the scope was not accounted in the budget.
* Continuously improve methods, adapt AI, applying lessons learned to optimize client value.
* Comply with Ramboll values and adhere to HSEQ standards


**Qualifications**
**Qualifications:**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Chemical Engineering or Mechanical Engineering.
* Minimum of 20 years of experience in the process, chemical, and petrochemical industries.
* Proven experience in the early phases of engineering, including conceptual design and feasibility studies.
* Experience in debottlenecking, facility augmentation, and troubleshooting
* Strong background in managing multi\\-discipline engineering projects in a global environment.
* Experience working on projects in Europe, the USA, and other regions.
* Excellent client\\-facing skills, ability to understand and address client needs, technology focus.
* Exceptional problem\\-solving and troubleshooting abilities.
* Possesses strong critical thinking, active listening skills.
* Strong leadership and team management skills.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
* Proficiency in engineering software and tools relevant to the process and chemical industries.
* Broader knowledge of technical disciplines involved in process engineering.
* Adapt to latest innovations and artificial intelligence applicable to process engineering.


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Experience in innovative solution development within the chemical and petrochemical sectors.
* Professional Engineer (PE) license or equivalent certification.


**Additional Information**
**Welcome to our Energy division**
 Ramboll is at the forefront of addressing the green transition and offers a holistic approach to energy that supports the sector on the journey towards more sustainable solutions. With 1,800 experts in 14 countries, covering the full spectrum of technologies and all parts of the value chain from production and transmission to distribution, we plan, design and implement energy solutions all over the world.
   

  

**Ramboll in Denmark \\& Chennai**
 Ramboll is a leading engineering, architecture and consultancy company founded in Denmark in 1945, with 16,500 employees globally. In Denmark and Chennai, we are 3,500 colleagues delivering innovative solutions within Buildings, Transport, Water, Environment \\& Health, Energy and Management Consulting. We invite you to contribute to a sustainable future, working in an open, collaborative and empowering culture.

title: Associate, Quality Services, Auto Software (Smart Vehicles)
description:
**Description**
 Quality Services (QS) organization provides testing support for Devices, Retail and AWS products. The primary objective of QS organization is to provide manual testing support. An Associate, Quality Services performs manual test execution of documented task instructions. They produce accurate test results meeting daily targets, adhering to defined processes.
   

  

**Roles \\& Responsibilities**
* Gain understanding of the application test procedures and how to use applicable software and tools.
* Execute test instructions and report test results accurately and promptly.
* Report any deviations observed
* Understand any changes in test instructions related to their assigned work
* Follow defined processes to perform assigned work.
* Will require to work on Shift timings based on business requirement.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of QA methodology and tools


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with testing consumer devices

**Senior Specialist, Testing Engineer – Applications \\& Data**
**The Opportunity**
* Based in Hyderabad, join a global healthcare biopharma company and be part of a 130\\- year legacy of success backed by ethical integrity, forward momentum, and an inspiring mission to achieve new milestones in global healthcare.
* Be part of an organisation driven by digital technology and data\\-backed approaches that support a diversified portfolio of prescription medicines, vaccines, and animal health products.

 Our Technology Centers focus on creating a space where teams can come together to deliver business solutions that save and improve lives. An integral part of our company’s IT operating model, Tech Centers are globally distributed locations where each IT division has employees to enable our digital transformation journey and drive business outcomes. These locations, in addition to the other sites, are essential to supporting our business and strategy.
   

  

 A focused group of leaders in each Tech Center helps to ensure we can manage and improve each location, from investing in growth, success, and well\\-being of our people, to making sure colleagues from each IT division feel a sense of belonging to managing critical emergencies. And together, we must leverage the strength of our team to collaborate globally to optimize connections and share best practices across the Tech Centers.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The Testing Engineer is responsible for designing and executing automated and manual tests to ensure the quality, reliability, performance, and usability of our systems and data products. This role works closely with product teams, software engineers, data engineers, and other stakeholders to understand requirements, design effective test strategies, and validate both application behavior and underlying data integrity.
   

  

 The ideal candidate combines strong testing expertise with hands\\-on programming skills, basic knowledge of modern web development frameworks, solid data engineering skills (
 **data models, SQL, and data validation** 
 ), and practical experience with our Quality Engineering toolset.
   

  

 What will you do in this role
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Test Strategy \\& Planning**
* Analyze and understand functional and non\\-functional requirements, technical design specifications, and data models for systems under test (applications, APIs, and data pipelines).
* Design comprehensive test strategies, including test plans and test suites covering functional, integration, regression, performance, security, and data validation testing.
* Define testing parameters in collaboration with product teams, developers, data engineers, and other project stakeholders.


 Test Design \\& Execution
   

  

* Design and implement test cases, test scripts, and test data for both manual and automated testing, mapping tests back to clear acceptance criteria and requirements.
* Create automated test scripts to cover UI, API, backend services, and data validation tests, leveraging appropriate frameworks and tools (e.g., Tosca, Robot Framework, Selenium, LoadRunner).
* Execute test suites, document results, identify defects, and track them through to resolution.
* Create detailed, step\\-by\\-step documentation of test procedures to ensure replicability and compliance with internal standards and regulatory expectations.


 Automation \\& Tools
   

  

* Align with automation best practices and standards, including coding standards, test design techniques, and modularized test case development.
* Develop, maintain, and optimize automated regression suites as part of CI/CD pipelines (e.g., via QE Test Hub and GitHub Actions).
* Use test management tools (e.g., Xray Test Management with Vera DevOps) to plan, track, and report on testing activities and coverage.
* Contribute to continuous improvement of the test automation framework, tooling, and test processes.


**Data Validation, Data Quality \\& Integrity**
* Collaborate with data engineers and product teams to understand data flows, data models, and business rules.
* Design and execute tests to validate data quality, data completeness, and data integrity across ETL/ELT pipelines, APIs, and downstream systems.
* Write and optimize SQL queries to validate datasets, transformations, aggregations, and reports.
* Identify data quality issues, perform root cause analysis, and work with engineering teams to define and validate fixes.
* Contribute to the definition of data quality metrics, test data strategies, and automated data validation checks.


 Collaboration \\& Stakeholder Management
   

  

* Meet regularly with product teams to determine testing parameters and align on priorities, schedules, and acceptance criteria.
* Work with cross\\-functional groups on project\\-wide efforts; demonstrate leadership in test design, product direction discussions, and quality\\-related decision\\-making.
* Engage with delivery teams to confirm that products and services meet service acceptance criteria and are delivered to the required standard.
* Provide input into change control processes, risk assessments, and release readiness decisions.
